summary: Tested 2 new major features: Tax Analysis Sync (with global data sync and delete capability) and Advanced Scenario Modeling (what-if analysis with projections). All features working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - charts still render correctly but warnings appear
Same chart dimension console warnings - charts render correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Both new pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Tax Analysis Sync correctly uses global PortfolioContext for family member data
Add/Delete family member operations show sync toast messages
Scenario Modeling correctly calculates projections based on assumptions and adjustments
Compare Mode allows selecting multiple scenarios for comparison
Chart dimension warnings in console are cosmetic - charts render correctly
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - uses localStorage and default values from App.js PortfolioContext
context_for_next_testing_agent: 2 new major features tested and working: 1) Tax Analysis Sync at /tax-analysis-sync with global data sync - family members can be added/deleted and changes sync across Income Splitting, Trust Distribution Analysis, Family Overview, and Household Budget modules. Shows 2024-25 Stage 3 tax rates. 2) Advanced Scenario Modeling at /scenario-modeling with what-if analysis - supports creating/duplicating/deleting scenarios, editing market assumptions and strategic adjustments, viewing projections with wealth breakdown charts, compare mode for multi-scenario comparison, and analysis tab with scenario ranking and key insights. Navigation updated with Scenario Modeling under Planning group and Tax Analysis pointing to synced version.

Buy Property and Sell Property toggles

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - stored in React Context and localStorage. No backend database connection.
